info.name: 4. 🎵 Tracks
info.description: Upload and manage audio tracks, metadata, and artwork. All track audio and artwork files are stored in AWS S3 under `tracks/audio/` and `tracks/artwork/` respectively.

formdata.value: A brand new single from the studio.

request.description:
## 1. Create Track

Uploads a new audio file and associated artwork to AWS S3, generates a permalink, extracts audio metadata (duration, bitrate, format), generates waveform peaks, and saves the track to the database.

**Authentication:** Required

### Form Data

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `audio_file` | File | Yes | Audio file (MP3, FLAC, WAV, AAC, max 30MB). |
| `artwork_file` | File | Yes | Cover image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, max 10MB). |
| `title` | String | Yes | Name of the track (max 100 chars). |
| `genre` | String | Yes | Genre enum (Electronic, Hip-Hop, Rock, Pop, Jazz, etc.). |
| `description` | String | No | Track description (max 200 chars). |
| `tags` | String | No | Up to 20 tags (send multiple form fields with same key). |

response.name: 201 Created

request.description:
## 2. Get Track by ID

Retrieves a single track by its ID. Private tracks can only be viewed by the owner.

**Authentication:** Required

### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | String | Yes | The track's ObjectId. |

request.description:
## 3. Update Track Metadata

Updates one or more metadata fields on a track. Only the track owner can perform this action.

**Authentication:** Required

### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | String | Yes | The track's ObjectId. |

### Request Body (All Optional)

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `title` | String | New track title (max 100 chars). |
| `genre` | String | Must match allowed genre enum. |
| `description` | String | Max 200 chars. |
| `tags` | Array | Up to 20 string tags. |
| `visibility` | String | `public` or `private`. |

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
    "_id": "track_id_123",
    "artist_id": "64f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1",

    "genre": "Hip-Hop",
    "description": "Updated description for the track.",
    "tags": ["chill", "vibes"],
    "visibility": "private",
    "status": "finished",
    "permalink": "my-updated-track-title-d4e5f6g7"
}

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Not Owner
401 Unauthorized – No Token

request.description:
## 4. Delete Track

Permanently deletes a track, including its audio file and artwork from AWS S3. Only the track owner can perform this action.

**Authentication:** Required

### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | String | Yes | The track's ObjectId. |

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Not Owner
401 Unauthorized – No Token

request.description:
## 5. Get Track Status

Polls the transcoding status of a track after upload. Only the track owner can view the status. Recommended polling interval: 3-5 seconds.

**Authentication:** Required

### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | String | Yes | The track's ObjectId. |

### Possible Status Values

| Status | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `processing` | Track is still being transcoded. |
| `finished` | Transcoding complete, track is ready. |
| `failed` | Transcoding failed. Check `error_message`. |

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Not Owner
401 Unauthorized – No Token

request.description:
## 6. Get Waveform

Returns the waveform peak data array for the audio player UI visualization. Each value is a float between 0.0 and 1.0. The `samples` field indicates how many data points are in the array (typically 200).

**Authentication:** Required

### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | String | Yes | The track's ObjectId. |

response.name: 401 Unauthorized – No Token

request.description:
## 7. Update Track Artwork

Replaces the cover artwork of an existing track. The old artwork is deleted from S3 (unless it is the default). Only the track owner can perform this action.

**Authentication:** Required

### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | String | Yes | The track's ObjectId. |

### Form Data

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `file` | File | Yes | New artwork image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, max 5MB). |

response.name: 400 Bad Request – Invalid Image
403 Forbidden – Not Owner
401 Unauthorized – No Token

request.description:
## 8. Get Artist Tracks

Retrieves all public, non-hidden tracks by a specific artist. Results are paginated.

**Authentication:** Required

### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | String | Yes | The artist's user ObjectId. |

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | Number | `1` | Pagination page. |
| `limit` | Number | `20` | Results per page. |

response.name: 401 Unauthorized – No Token
